title: [Nyessem, Primal Empowerment]
description: The walls glow with a palpable pearlescence.  A stone path speckled with multihued gemstones meanders to the center of the room, surrounding a flame-veined carnelian pedestal and a rune-carved snowflake obsidian plinth.  Between the pedestal and the plinth, a squat marble pillar topped by a gem-inlaid silver orb is erected.
